snippet: Your technician appointment is set! Hello Denys, Our technician will visit you at Engelselei 81, 2140 Borgerhout (Box 6 Floor 3) to install the Scarlet connection point: · on 02/03/2026 between 08:00
subject: Important: Your installation appointment is confirmed
body:
Your technician appointment is set!

   
   
Hello Denys,
   


Our technician will visit you at Engelselei 81, 2140 Borgerhout (Box 6 Floor 3) 
to install the Scarlet connection point:
	· on 02/03/2026 between 08:00 and 17:00
  
We’ll send you a reminder via SMS two days before your appointment. On the day, 
you’ll get a call at 0032479280165 about 30 minutes before the technician arrives. 
Make sure someone is home to give access and answer any questions.
  
Not available? Reschedule your appointment (https://www.scarlet.be/en/order-completion/all-scarlet/index/main.html?token=9626a652wi95347299x2) 
 (https://www.scarlet.be/contact)  up to 24 hours in advance to avoid extra costs.
  




What to expect during installation
  		|  
We install fiber to your home		|  
	· We will make a small hole (about the size of a pen) in your facade to bring 
the cable in. We seal it well and clean up carefully after. No visible marks! 
(https://youtu.be/Sd6sC27dgWY) 
 (https://youtu.be/Sd6sC27dgWY)    		|  

		|  
	· Together, we will choose the best spot for your modem. You need 2 outlets or 
a power strip nearby.
	· We will test the connection throughout your home, and if needed, install boosters 
so you can surf at top speed in every room.
	· We will also help connect all your devices.		|  

		|  
Rest assured, we will take care of everything, and you will only be disconnected 
for a few minutes.
		|  




Numbers to keep
  		|  
	· Connection number: 103023535807		|  
	· Customer number: 29334701		|  
	· Request reference number: R00000011000129NP6		|  




  
Do you have an alarm system?
Check whether your alarm system can continue to work with fiber.
  
Do you live in an apartment?
If there is a common technical room, it must be accessible to our technician.
  
Is there an elevator?
Note that in this case, the installation of fiber may affect the elevator emergency 
call system.
  
Still have questions?
Visit www.scarlet.be/support (https://www.scarlet.be/support)  or call us on 02 
275 27 27. Make sure to mention your customer number 29334701.
  




Best regards,

The Scarlet team

All rights reserved. © 2026 Scarlet is a trademark of Proximus PLC under Public 
Law, Bd. du Roi Albert II 27, B-1030 Brussels, VAT BE 0202.239.951, Brussels Register 
of Legal Entities, Giro BE82 2100 0008 8968 – www.scarlet.be (https://www.scarlet.be)
